name: Media Deck
summary: Now playing and transport controls on the HUD.
description: Whatever plays on your phone shows on the glasses: title, artist, artwork, and progress. Tap to play or pause, swipe to skip. Audio never passes through Nexus.
author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Whatever plays on your phone shows on the glasses: title, artist, artwork, and progress. Tap to play or pause, swipe to skip. Audio never passes through Nexus.

releases.notes:
- Android 11 support: the plugin now installs on Android 11 (API 30) phones.

### Artifact

- File: `media-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `504e629ccb59f483c36345a13606edc6f3ce77807e90140af979b88b0bfd61ab`

- The app icon in Android settings and installer dialogs is now the plugin's own glyph on the Nexus dark background (adaptive icon), instead of a washed-out or generic mark.

### Artifact

- File: `media-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `5ea6cd809af90ab2d9aeeddb0901d0ce9634b3d895fa157e7c81e284ec940194`

- First release as a headless plugin APK (previously an in-hub built-in).
- Typed media surface with playback anchor and 96×96 one-bit artwork.
- Transport controls from the glasses: tap play/pause, swipe previous/next.
- Own notification listener ("Nexus Media Deck") and kit settings screen with
  notification-access onboarding and uninstall.

### Artifact

- File: `media-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `506ebd725ab9013b6b6ac87c861ea2a8711382fdf256392de75e3cf161f7a3bd`
